No appeareance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or an objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court 3.1385. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

MINI MINUTES: No Appearances: PLAINTIFF JONATHAN LABOVICH Motion To Compel Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents, Set One. The matter is taken OFF CALENDAR per request of the moving party. Judge Pro Tem Roger Mead, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D302/JPT)

MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Benjeman Beck, of Strategic Legal Practices, APC, Tel. 410.929.4900, for plaintiffs;
Paul Lecky, of Becherer Kannett & Schweitzer, Tel. 510.658.3600, for defendants Nissan North America LLC;
Court Reporter: David A. Disbrow, CSR No. 7768, Tel. 415.298.1538.

Ruling: A R G U E D. PLAINTIFF JONATHAN LABOVICH Motion To Compel Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents, Set One is continued to August 15, 2017, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 302 - Discovery, for further hearing. The parties are ordered to meet and confer and report back to the Judge Pro Tem by July 24, 2017. Supplemental briefing schedule set forth in open court. Judge Pro Tem: Roger Mead; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: David A. Disbrow, CSR No. 7768, Tel. 415.298.1538; Dept. 302.
